title: CCC Ground Truth Upgrade
description:
Fix all issues identified in the 2026-03-06 ground-truth audit of the Claude Command Center. Covers: server crash loop fix, daemon fleet audit, failing test fix, stale documentation updates, missing screenshots, script audit, staleness indicator, and final documentation reconciliation.

Audit reference: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-dicoangelo/memory/ccc-grounded.md

title: US-001: Fix API Server Port Conflict Crash Loop
description:
As a user, I want the CCC API server to start reliably so that the dashboard is always available when I need it.

The server at ccc-api-server.py (port 8766) is crash-looping because KeepAlive restarts it while the old process still holds the port. Fix the root cause.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Add SO_REUSEADDR socket option to ccc-api-server.py before server_bind()
- [ ] Add startup logic that detects port 8766 in use (lsof -ti:8766), identifies the PID, and kills it before binding
- [ ] Server starts successfully after a fresh launchctl kickstart of com.claude.api-server
- [ ] curl http://localhost:8766/api/health returns 200 after server start
- [ ] Error log at ~/.claude/logs/api-server-error.log shows no crash loop entries after fix
- [ ] python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short passes
- [ ] ruff check scripts/ config/ passes

title: US-002: Audit and Fix Daemon Fleet
description:
As a maintainer, I want only necessary daemons running so that system resources are not wasted and the watchdog can focus on what matters.

Currently 11 of 13 LaunchAgents are not running. The watchdog monitors 9 daemons but most are down.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Document the purpose and necessity of each of the 13 LaunchAgents in ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.claude.* in a table
- [ ] Classify each as KEEP, FIX, or REMOVE with justification
- [ ] Fix all KEEP daemons so they run successfully (launchctl list shows PID, exit 0)
- [ ] Remove plist files for REMOVE daemons from ~/Library/LaunchAgents/
- [ ] Update ccc-watchdog.py CRITICAL_DAEMONS list to match the kept set only
- [ ] Run ccc-status.sh and verify it reports all kept daemons as healthy
- [ ] python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short passes
- [ ] ruff check scripts/ config/ passes

title: US-003: Fix Failing Test test_update_daily_stats
description:
As a developer, I want all tests to pass so that CI is green and regressions are caught.

tests/test_datastore.py:104 fails with: assert '2026-02-14' in [] — the dates list is empty after calling update_daily_stats.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Read tests/test_datastore.py:104 and trace the root cause of the empty dates list
- [ ] Fix the bug in either the test or the config/datastore.py implementation (whichever is wrong)
- [ ] python3 -m pytest tests/test_datastore.py -v shows 0 failures
- [ ] Full suite: python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short shows 0 failures, 0 errors
- [ ] ruff check scripts/ config/ passes

title: US-004: Update Stale Documentation — Tab Count and Test Count
description:
As a future AI session or contributor, I want documentation to match reality so I do not build on false assumptions.

README says 15-Tab and 124 tests. CLAUDE.md says 12-tab. Actual: 17 tabs, 139 test functions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] README.md: Update "15-Tab Mission Control" to "17-Tab Mission Control" in header
- [ ] README.md: Update tests badge from "124 passing" to actual passing count from latest test run
- [ ] README.md: Add tabs 16 (Autonomy) and 17 (Velocity) to the tab gallery section with placeholder for screenshots
- [ ] Grep across ~/.claude/ for "12-tab" or "15-tab" references and list any found (do NOT edit CLAUDE.md — flag for user)
- [ ] python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short passes
- [ ] ruff check scripts/ config/ passes

title: US-005: Update Stale Documentation — ROI and Cost Figures
description:
As a user, I want cost/ROI documentation to reflect actual database values, not outdated snapshots.

CLAUDE.md says 4.5x ROI. The DB view v_subscription_summary computes 16.9x. Neither is externally validated.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Query v_subscription_summary view for current ROI multiplier and total API equivalent value
- [ ] Query v_daily_costs for current average daily API equivalent
- [ ] List the stale values found in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md Cost and Value table (do NOT edit — flag for user approval)
- [ ] Update ~/.claude/projects/-Users-dicoangelo/memory/ccc-grounded.md ROI section with current DB values
- [ ] Add a note: "Auto-computed from claude.db. Self-assessed, not externally validated."
- [ ] python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short passes
- [ ] ruff check scripts/ config/ passes

title: US-006: Capture Screenshots for Tabs 16-17
description:
As a README visitor, I want to see all 17 tabs in the gallery so nothing looks incomplete.

Screenshots exist for tabs 1-15. Tabs 16 (Autonomy) and 17 (Velocity) were added after the Feb 13 screenshot session.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Verify CCC API server is running on localhost:8766 (depends on US-001 being complete)
- [ ] Navigate to localhost:8766/dashboard in Chrome DevTools
- [ ] Click Autonomy tab, take screenshot, save as assets/tabs/16-autonomy.png
- [ ] Click Velocity tab, take screenshot, save as assets/tabs/17-velocity.png
- [ ] Add both screenshots to README.md tab gallery in correct order after 15-infrastructure
- [ ] Verify screenshots render correctly in README preview
- [ ] python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short passes
- [ ] ruff check scripts/ config/ passes

title: US-007: Audit Unvalidated Scripts — Test or Remove
description:
As a maintainer, I want every script in the repo to be either tested and documented or removed, so there is no dead code.

Three scripts have no tests and unclear operational status: ccc-autonomous-brain.py, ccc-autopilot.py, ccc-intelligence-layer.py.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Read ccc-autonomous-brain.py — determine if it is called by any daemon, LaunchAgent, or other script (grep for references)
- [ ] Read ccc-autopilot.py — determine if it is called by any daemon, LaunchAgent, or other script
- [ ] Read ccc-intelligence-layer.py — determine if it is called by any daemon, LaunchAgent, or other script
- [ ] For each script: if actively used, add at least 3 tests to a new or existing test file; if unused, remove from repo AND remove symlink from ~/.claude/scripts/
- [ ] Update .ccc-originals-backup/ directory if scripts are removed (remove backup copies too)
- [ ] If scripts are kept, ensure docstring header explains what triggers them and when
- [ ] python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short passes
- [ ] ruff check scripts/ config/ passes

title: US-008: Add Data Staleness Indicator to Dashboard
description:
As a dashboard user, I want to see when data was last updated so I know if I am looking at stale information.

Currently there is no visible indicator of data freshness. If daemons are down, the dashboard shows old data with no warning.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Add a "Last updated: X minutes ago" indicator to the dashboard nav bar area
- [ ] The indicator queries MAX(timestamp) from activity_events (or MAX(updated_at) from daily_stats) via the SSE stream or a new API endpoint
- [ ] If data is older than 1 hour, show the indicator in yellow/warning color (var(--accent-yellow))
- [ ] If data is older than 24 hours, show the indicator in red (var(--accent-red))
- [ ] If data is fresh (under 1 hour), show in green (var(--accent-green))
- [ ] The indicator updates on each SSE tick (every 3s)
- [ ] Take Chrome DevTools screenshot to verify the indicator is visible
- [ ] python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short passes
- [ ] ruff check scripts/ config/ passes

title: US-009: Final Documentation Reconciliation
description:
As a future AI session, I want all memory files to reflect the post-upgrade state so the ground-truth audit is current.

This is the final story. It runs after all other stories are complete and updates documentation to match the new reality.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Run full test suite — record exact pass/fail/skip counts
- [ ] Run launchctl list | grep claude — record daemon states
- [ ] Run curl localhost:8766/api/health — confirm server running
- [ ] Update ~/.claude/projects/-Users-dicoangelo/memory/ccc-grounded.md with post-upgrade state (test counts, daemon states, server status, tab count)
- [ ] Update ~/.claude/projects/-Users-dicoangelo/memory/MEMORY.md CCC section with current facts
- [ ] Grep for any remaining stale references ("12-tab", "15-tab", "124 tests", "4.5x ROI") across ~/.claude/ and list any found
- [ ] python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short passes
- [ ] ruff check scripts/ config/ passes
